reviews.author: Preston Alexander
reviews.text: I've had the opportunity to work with Josh on a few different occasions, and he is absolutely fantastic to work with. He and his team provide quality work and they are great at communicating and making it a very pleasant experience for clients. If you are in need of painting, these are the people to work with.

reviews.author: NoCo Pet Doors
reviews.text:
If you need a reliable, professional painting company in Timnath, CO, Timnath Painting is the one to call. Josh, the owner, is hands-on, knowledgeable, and committed to delivering high-quality results. It’s clear he takes pride in his work and in serving homeowners throughout Timnath and Northern Colorado.

I highly recommend Timnath Painting to anyone looking for interior or exterior house painting in Timnath, Fort Collins, Windsor, or the surrounding NoCo area. If you want great communication, attention to detail, and a local painting contractor you can trust, Josh and his team will absolutely take care of you.

reviews.author: Michael Weant
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a professional painting company in Timnath, Colorado, I highly recommend Timnath Painting. Josh, the owner, runs an outstanding local business and truly cares about quality and customer satisfaction. Highly recommend to anyone in Timnath, Fort Collins, Windsor, or Northern Colorado looking for top-quality painting services!

reviews.author: Nathan
reviews.text: Josh is an awesome person to work with. He cares for his projects but also the customer behind the work. I would recommend him to anyone who needs painting work done on their home or business!

reviews.author: Jacob Smith
reviews.text: Josh did some general contracting work for me.   Basement and bathroom remodel did an excellent job.  Very good communicator.   Would Definitely hire him again for any general contracting or painting.
